title: holandrea schottii
intro: Holandrea schottii is a plant species of the family Rubiaceae, also known as the madder family, and is native to South America. Holandrea schottii has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic qualities. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever and relieving pain, as well as supporting the immune system. Holandrea schottii is commonly prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture for its medicinal and health benefits.
